---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Propose a new feature, view, or player enhancement for Nexora IPTV Global
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["type: feature"]
assignees: ""
---

### 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I find it difficult to watch multiple sports games simultaneously..."

---

### 🚀 Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen. What new button, view, or API route should be added?

---

### 🎨 Visual Layout & Mockups
If you have a wireframe or mock-up of how the feature could fit into Nexora's dark slate interface, please describe or attach it here.

---

### 🎯 Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

---

### 🛑 Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
